summary: prism-memory modules that derive structural tags and rule features from memory entries and use them to rank structural recall results.
evidence: `structural.rs` ranks structural memories using derived features, and `structural_features.rs` extracts tags, rule kinds, and promoted-rule evidence from memory entries.
This is the rule- and invariant-oriented half of model-backed memory recall.
risk_hint: If these features drift, structural memories can be retrieved confidently for the wrong architectural rule or invariant.
